title: 10 Signs a Godly Man Is Winning the War Nobody Sees
caption:
The war nobody sees is the one that matters most.

The 6 AM alarm. The Word before the feed. The 'no' he said to the thing that seemed harmless. The apology to his brother before anyone asked for it. The prayer for the man he's tempted to resent.

None of these move the needle in a single day. All of them — over months, over years — make a man.

The man who wins the hidden war becomes the man worth following in the visible one.

"He who is faithful in a very little thing is also faithful in much." — Luke 16:10

Save this for the week it doesn't feel like anything is happening.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thework #faithfulness #selfmastery #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
